scripts.test:delivery-address:chrome-desktop: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=chromium DEVICE=desktop cucumber-js --profile default --profile deliveryAddress
scripts.test:delivery-address:chrome-mobile: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=chromium DEVICE=mobile cucumber-js --profile default --profile deliveryAddress
scripts.test:delivery-address:safari-desktop: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=webkit DEVICE=desktop cucumber-js --profile default --profile deliveryAddress
scripts.test:delivery-address:safari-mobile: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=webkit DEVICE=mobile cucumber-js --profile default --profile deliveryAddress
scripts.test:delivery-address:all-headed: npm run test:delivery-address:chrome-desktop && npm run test:delivery-address:chrome-mobile && npm run test:delivery-address:safari-desktop && npm run test:delivery-address:safari-mobile
scripts.test:delivery-address:bs:chrome-desktop: cross-env TEST_ENV=browserstack BROWSERSTACK_PROFILE=chrome-desktop cucumber-js --profile default --profile deliveryAddress --profile browserStack
scripts.test:delivery-address:bs:safari-desktop: cross-env TEST_ENV=browserstack BROWSERSTACK_PROFILE=safari-desktop cucumber-js --profile default --profile deliveryAddress --profile browserStack
scripts.test:delivery-address:bs:all: npm run test:delivery-address:bs:chrome-desktop && npm run test:delivery-address:bs:safari-desktop
scripts.test:product-cart:chrome-desktop: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=chromium DEVICE=desktop cucumber-js --profile default --profile productCart
scripts.test:product-cart:chrome-mobile: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=chromium DEVICE=mobile cucumber-js --profile default --profile productCart
scripts.test:product-cart:safari-desktop: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=webkit DEVICE=desktop cucumber-js --profile default --profile productCart
scripts.test:product-cart:safari-mobile: cross-env HEADLESS=false BROWSER=webkit DEVICE=mobile cucumber-js --profile default --profile productCart
scripts.test:product-cart:all-headed: npm run test:product-cart:chrome-desktop && npm run test:product-cart:chrome-mobile && npm run test:product-cart:safari-desktop && npm run test:product-cart:safari-mobile
